programme.title: The Heroes Of The Somme

programme.title: Gallipoli: Last ANZACs Tell All
programme.desc: Narrated by Jack Thompson and featuring the last Gallipoli Anzacs, this film challenges the widely held perspective of the Gallipoli Campaign and the birth of the Anzac legend.

programme.title: Gladiators of WWII
programme.desc: The Anzacs were among the finest fighting troops in the world, and the first to succeed against the Japanese. Look at some of their finest work in Libya, Tobruk, Crete, and Kokoda.

programme.title: The ANZAC Spirit
programme.desc: Through the resources of the Australian War Memorial - photographs, documents, objects - Neil Pigot tells six stories of the ANZACs.

programme.title: Western Front: Last Survivors Tell All

programme.title: Winning WWI: The Western Front Diaries

programme.title: The ANZAC Spirit
